ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "invoice_no" TEXT /* Invoice number for the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., placed, shipped, delivered, canceled) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "stock_code" INTEGER /* Stock code of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES products ("stock_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "stock_code" INTEGER /* Stock code of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder is triggered */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment is for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the discount is applied to */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "minimum_spend" REAL /* Minimum spend required to apply the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the promotion is applied to */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., buy one get one free) */,
  "promotion_amount" REAL /* Amount of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "minimum_spend" REAL /* Minimum spend required to apply the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the invoice is for */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the invoice */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount amount applied to the invoice */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Total tax amount for the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receipts" (
  "receipt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receipt */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the receipt is for */,
  "receipt_date" TEXT /* Date the receipt was generated */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the receipt */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount amount applied to the receipt */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Total tax amount for the receipt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receipt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receipts_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales trend */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales trend */,
  "sales_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold of the product */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the sales */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin for the sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* Customer's preferred payment method */,
  "preferred_shipping_method" TEXT /* Customer's preferred shipping method */,
  "preferred_category" TEXT /* Customer's preferred product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
